Introduction to Hemphill County

Arrows in Hemphill County

Arrow #47: Canadian

More Details for Arrow #47

Coordinates: 35.9233218, -100.3767383

Installed: December 5, 2012

Marker Text:

Peta Nocona died of old war wound while picking wild plums on Canadian River; buried in Antelope Hills, c. 1863

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Welcome to the Quanah Parker Trail!

Explore the historical arrow markers commemorating Quanah Parker and the Comanche people across the Texas Plains Trail Region. Use the map on the homepage or navigate via the menu to learn more about this effort.
